display_text: Sniper Aghanim's Scepter: Causes Assassinate to fire quicker and stun the enemy target. This upgrade enhances Sniper's anti-escape and initiation capabilities, allowing him to reliably disable key targets before they can react or retreat.
search_text: Sniper Aghanim Scepter anti-escape initiation stun disable Assassinate

display_text: Sniper Aghanim's Shard: Grants Concussive Grenade, which disarms and slows enemies while knocking them and Sniper back. This upgrade provides Sniper with anti-melee defense and crowd control, enabling him to create space and disrupt enemy positioning in fights.
search_text: Sniper Aghanim Shard anti-melee crowd control disarm knockback Concussive Grenade
